message:
refactor(rch): convert remaining bail!() in config_edit and web commands (bd-1nk5)

- config.rs: Use EditorError::ExitedWithError for editor failures
- main.rs: Use WebError::ServerExitedWithError and WebError::DashboardNotFound
- Update test to match new error message format

Continues work from IvoryBridge.
